patches_modified.name: Unlimited gems, rubies & unlock all
patches_modified.description: Sets gems, rubies (diamonds), keys and tickets to 9999999. Unlocks VIP (removes ads + VIP rewards + Ninja Assassin VIP character), all assassin characters (2-44), including all Legendary characters (Scarecrow, Dracula, Thor, Wolverine, Myers, Santa, Grinch, Nutcracker, Cricket Player), and all special knives.
